---
title: "OxPhos Disease-Associated Variant Analysis"
author: "Abhilesh Dhawanjewar"
format:
    html:
        code-fold: true
        embed-resources: true
        toc: true
        toc-location: left
        html-math-method: katex
        theme: cosmo
execute:
    echo: false
    warning: false
    message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(here)
```

## Data Sources

#### Cannonical OXPHOS Gene List

The list of canonical OXPHOS genes was obtained from the HUGO Gene Nomenclature Committee database for gene group: [Mitochondrial respiratory chain complex subunits](https://www.genenames.org/data/genegroup/#!/group/639)

#### Disease Variant Annotations

Missense disease-associated variants for mtDNA were retrieved from the [MITOMAP database](https://www.mitomap.org/MITOMAP/MutationsCodingControl) for mitochondrial genes and from the [ClinVar database](https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/clinvar/tab_delimited/variant_summary.txt.gz) for nuclear-encoded OXPHOS genes.

The reference genome for these annotations were:

- mtDNA: `NC_012920.1` (rCRS) for mtDNA
- nucDNA: `GRCh38` for nuclear DNA.
